items.title: Air Canada CEO 'deeply saddened' his poor French skills distracted from victims of crash
items.dek: Michael Rousseau has faced calls to resign for not speaking French in his message after the LaGuardia crash, which killed two Air Canada pilots.
items.body: Michael Rousseau has faced calls to resign for not speaking French in his message after the LaGuardia crash, which killed two Air Canada pilots.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Senegal to parade Afcon trophy despite title being stripped
items.dek: Senegal's Football Federation boss calls the decision to hand Morocco the Afcon title a "robbery" amid plans to parade the trophy before Saturday's friendly aga
items.body: Senegal's Football Federation boss calls the decision to hand Morocco the Afcon title a "robbery" amid plans to parade the trophy before Saturday's friendly against Peru in Paris.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: French court hands Islam scholar Tariq Ramadan 18-year jail term for rape
items.dek: Ramadan, a 63-year-old former Oxford professor, denied the charges but his lawyers said he was too ill to attend the trial.
items.body: Ramadan, a 63-year-old former Oxford professor, denied the charges but his lawyers said he was too ill to attend the trial.
items.author: IriLine Desk
